word: G1421 - δυσερμήνευτος - dysermḗneutos - doos-er-mane'-yoo-tos - Hard to be uttered

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Hard to be uttered
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Adjective / பெயரடை
hard to interpret, difficult of explanation
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G1418 and a presumed derivative of G2059; difficult of explanation: - hard to be uttered.
